name: BBQ Chicken #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a plastic bag.
2. Press air out of the bag and seal it securely.
3. Rotate gently to coat the chicken evenly.
4. Refrigerate for 4 to 6 hours.
5. Grill or broil at 12-16 inches from the heat source, for 12-16 minutes on each side, until fully cooked.
